children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read and parse input data from source, store raw data in raw_data store
children.behavior: Extract source from input, read data, parse into records, store in raw_data, return count and errors

global_vars.description: write parsed records to raw_data store

constraints.description: Must handle malformed input gracefully without crashing

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid source, records_ingested > 0 and errors list empty
Given invalid source, records_ingested = 0 and errors list populated

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformations to raw data and store in processed_data
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply transformation rules (e.g., mapping, cleaning), write to processed_data, return count and errors
children.signature: def TransformData(transform_config: dict, raw_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: read raw records from raw_data store
write transformed records to processed_data store

constraints.description: Must preserve record count unless config specifies filtering

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid raw_data and config, records_transformed > 0 and errors list empty
Given empty raw_data, records_transformed = 0 and errors list empty

children.name: ValidateQuality
children.purpose: Check quality of transformed data, mark invalid records
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply validation rules (e.g., schema, range, completeness), mark invalid records, return validation summary
postconditions: valid records are marked, invalid records are flagged

inputs.name: validation_rules
inputs.description: Rules for quality checks from parent input

children.signature: def ValidateQuality(validation_rules: dict, processed_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: read processed_data, update with validity flags

data_operations.description: read records and update with validity flags

constraints.description: Must not modify original record content, only add validity flag

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid processed_data, valid_count + invalid_count equals total records

children.name: ExportResults
children.purpose: Export only valid records to output destination
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter valid records, write to output destination (e.g., file, API), return export summary

inputs.name: export_destination
inputs.description: Target for export from parent input

inputs.name: processed_data
inputs.description: Transformed records with validity flags from processed_data store

children.signature: def ExportResults(export_destination: str, processed_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: read processed_data to filter valid records

constraints.description: Must only export records where validity flag is true
Must handle network errors gracefully and return them in errors list

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid processed_data with valid records, records_exported > 0 and errors list empty
Given processed_data with no valid records, records_exported = 0 and errors list empty
Given network failure, records_exported = 0 and errors list contains error description

governance_notes: All children share parent's global_vars (raw_data, processed_data) as specified. IngestData only writes to raw_data. TransformData reads raw_data and writes processed_data. ValidateQuality reads and writes processed_data (adding validity flags). ExportResults only reads processed_data. Data operations union covers parent's data needs: raw_data write (IngestData), raw_data read (TransformData), processed_data write (TransformData), processed_data read_write (ValidateQuality), processed_data read (ExportResults). Node types: IngestData, TransformData, ValidateQuality are pure_functions (no side effects beyond data stores). ExportResults is atomic_operation due to network I/O. Acceptance criteria cover success and failure paths. Constraints enforce data integrity and error handling.
